title: Enchantment Info
description: Shows compatibilities and other info about Enchantments in Enchanted Book's tooltip.
body:
## Enchantment Info Enchantment Info is a client-side mod that shows Enchantment compatibility with other Enchantments, items and item categories in Enchanted Book's tooltip, even for custom Enchantments! ### Quick UI overview ![Mod UI Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40efa8fc7380dcf0c350903ed57048d6078bdf8a.png) Below Enchantment name appears incompatible Enchantments, followed by compatible and incompatible item groups and items.
Multiple Enchantments will form groups with common traits. ### Compatibility Mod targets to be compatible with any mod that adds new Enchantments to the game.
Enchantment Info intended to be used in large modpacks as must have helping mod.
